clang++ -fPIC  -w -m32 -mmmx -msse -msse2 -mfpmath=sse -O2 -fvisibility=hidden -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -Wno-parentheses -pipe -mtune=generic -fomit-frame-pointer -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,ebot.so -o /project/project/ebot/ebot.so CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/basecode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/callbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/chatlib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/clib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/combat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/globals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/navigate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/netmsg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/precomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EBOT.dir/project/source/waypoint.cpp.o  -ldl
